title: WSL path alias /mnt/c/code/ creates silent duplicate AI memory contexts
summary: When a project is opened via /mnt/c/code/ (Windows-side WSL mount) instead of /home/mario/projects/, Claude Code creates a separate project memory context keyed to the wrong path. The two contexts diverge silently — the /mnt/c/code/ copy accumulates stale state while the canonical /home/mario/projects/ copy receives updates. This has been observed across minder, basher, wheelwright-framework, and wheelwright-hub.
pattern: WSL projects should always be opened via /home/mario/projects/ paths, never via /mnt/c/code/. All AI tools (Claude Code, Codex config.toml trust entries, any path-keyed memory) are affected.
fix_applied: Replaced stale /mnt/c/code/ MEMORY.md files with redirect stubs pointing to canonical paths. Created feedback_canonical_paths.md memory entry to prevent recurrence.
recommendation: Each spoke should audit ~/.claude/projects/ for -mnt-c-code-* directories and replace their MEMORY.md with redirect stubs. basher doctor global scope should flag /mnt/c/code/ entries in ~/.codex/config.toml trust list.
